calendar.matters:
Petition Confirming Title To Trust Property
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Gregory Rocca for the Petitioner.

The Court stated that everything appeared to be in order. The Court granted the petition confirming title of property located at 1450 Halloway and 454 Ralston to the trust, (subject to review of the proposed order).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris and M. Anderson.
